267.reason: [When a single '&' is encountered, an error is correctly reported, but the token type is still set to AND, which causes an invalid token to be added to the token list instead of skipping it or handling it as an error-only case.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [When a single '&' is encountered, an error is correctly reported, but the token type is still set to AND, which causes an invalid token to be added to the token list instead of skipping it or handling it as an error-only case.]

276.reason: [Same issue as above: for a single '|', an error is reported but the token type is still set to OR, leading to incorrect token generation in addition to the error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: for a single '|', an error is reported but the token type is still set to OR, leading to incorrect token generation in addition to the error.]
